temporal_description:
The audio is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful ambient score. A close-up shot focuses on a man with short, dark hair, wearing a dark suit jacket over a light blue collared shirt. He has a serious, intense expression as he looks slightly off-camera. The background is dark and out of focus, with a greenish-blue tint to the lighting, suggesting a dimly lit, possibly industrial or warehouse-like environment. Other figures are blurred in the background. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The camera remains steady, emphasizing the man's focused gaze. The music is slow and atmospheric, creating a tense and serious mood, as if building up to a significant confrontation or a moment of high stakes. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects, allowing the dramatic, low-frequency music to dominate the soundscape.

The camera cuts to a medium shot of an older man with short, graying hair. He is wearing a light-colored suit jacket and has a concerned or worried expression on his face. Behind him, two other men stand in the background, out of focus. The setting and lighting remain consistent with the previous shot, maintaining the dark, greenish-blue color palette. The white Chinese text is still present in the top left corner. The camera is static, holding the focus on the older man's reaction.

The shot changes to a medium view of another man in a dark suit and tie. He has a stern, determined look on his face. Other men in suits are visible in the blurred background, suggesting a group of people in a similar dimly lit, industrial-style space. The camera is steady, capturing the man's resolute expression as the suspenseful music continues to play.
